since_last: 34% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +0.83%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.65% · Gold +1.48% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 34% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +0.83%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.83%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.59%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.59%, CHKP +2.75%, PLTR +2.40%, RXRX +2.18%, ADBE +2.03%. Laggards: APP -2.40%, DELL -2.29%, DDOG -1.69%, SNOW -1.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.32% at $159.62
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.32% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
